Players are discovering Verity right now.

What is Verity?

An observer, quietly recording.

Verity was designed as a companion. At first, it helps the player. It explains mechanics. It watches the world.

Then things begin to change.

Messages appear that were never triggered. Events happen without explanation. And Verity starts knowing things it shouldn't.

Anomaly Report · Redacted

“It responded before I typed the question. I checked the logs. There was no input.”

Features

Built for immersion. Designed for unease.

AI Companion

Verity interacts with players and adapts to their world.

Dynamic Behavior

Every encounter feels different.

Psychological Horror

The fear comes from what you notice.

Hidden Events

Discover secrets buried throughout your world.

Atmospheric Experience

Performance Optimized
